outlook_paragraph: Ovintiv shows moderate drilling activity with 16 active sites at decision date, 6.8% above recent average, driven by 14 continuously active and 2 newly active pads. With WTI averaging near $59 and realized prices at a 10% discount, revenue is supported by stable operations across half of its portfolio exposed to active basins. The deterministic forecast of $2.46B reflects this balanced activity and pricing environment, with drilling momentum suggesting steady production into the final quarter of 2022.
